active_adapter_execution_validation.claim_boundary: The atlas can report command-level hook compatibility and active config alignment. It does not prove a real Claude or Codex process consumed the config.

live_execution_state.reason: Staleness detection reads files and SQLite authority only; it does not execute Claude or Codex.

analytics_only_ingestion.empty_state: Analytics-only routes and import contracts are available; missing facts render as honest empty states.

analytics_only_profile.empty_state_policy: show honest empty states from current authority

domains.domain_name: Installed Adapter Runtime And Global Router

known_gaps: visual route-state explanation remains a dashboard maturity layer
areas.next_action: Expose route decision explainability through Contract Atlas/dashboard.

known_gaps: SQLite-first canonical Work Order storage is still maturing
areas.next_action: Continue SQLite-first artifact authority maturation.

known_gaps: handoffs remain exceptional, not normal workflow transitions
areas.next_action: Keep route-first guardrails blocking prompt-chaining regressions.
validation: handoff prompt and next-prompt contract tests

known_gaps: not every historical artifact has been promoted to SQLite canonical form
areas.next_action: Finish SQLite-first artifact authority maturation.

known_gaps: context completeness still has room to reduce null/unknown IDs
areas.next_action: Continue telemetry context completeness maturation.

known_gaps: full visual Contract Atlas dashboard remains a later maturity layer
areas.next_action: Build visual Contract Atlas dashboard after foundation is stable.

known_gaps: external project mutation remains approval-scoped
areas.next_action: Keep external targets paused unless registry scope explicitly opens them.

known_gaps: PRD must stay current through docs drift gate when product authority changes
areas.next_action: Use the drift gate to block stale product-authority docs.

known_gaps: project-wide scanner execution remains bounded by scope and approval
areas.next_action: Mature security drilldowns and remediation work-order generation.

known_gaps: component performance analytics can be deepened
areas.next_action: Continue component hardening intelligence.
validation: skill/token, workflow/research/decision, and hook route tests

known_gaps: live multi-adapter execution is not fully proven
areas.next_action: Validate agent/model independence and multi-agent demo boundaries.

known_gaps: real Claude process execution consuming the projection is unproven
areas.next_action: Run an explicitly approved live Claude adapter execution validation.

known_gaps: real Codex hook execution on fresh message submission is not independently proven here
areas.next_action: Keep Codex hook compatibility monitored during local dogfood.

known_gaps: provider costs and quality signals require ongoing real usage evidence
areas.next_action: Correlate model/provider outcomes with token and validation data.
validation: model-provider route and capability matrix tests

known_gaps: cross-model live resume remains dry-run/simulated unless separately approved
areas.next_action: Prove agent/model independence with a real adapter handoff when safe.

known_gaps: more real adapter result shapes should be sampled during dogfood
areas.next_action: Capture real adapter outputs as normalized result fixtures.

known_gaps: full visual dashboard layer is intentionally deferred
areas.next_action: Build the visual Contract Atlas dashboard layer.

known_gaps: reviewed-no-change decisions require explicit gate input
areas.next_action: Keep source-to-doc impact matrix current as new domains appear.

known_gaps: Docker profiles are optional designs; containers are not started or required
areas.next_action: Implement optional Docker runtime profiles only after separate approval.

known_gaps: not yet packaged as a standalone runtime mode
areas.next_action: Expose analytics-only runtime option after dashboard profile maturity.

known_gaps: external project mutation remains out of scope unless explicitly approved
areas.next_action: Build reusable external project pipeline under separate registry scope.
areas.owner_source: project registry and external validation docs
validation: paused target and external dashboard tests

known_gaps: live GitHub polling/merge remains approval and CI-state dependent
full remote CI is manual to preserve Actions minutes
areas.next_action: Use PR smoke as remote confidence and local ci_gate.py as the heavy release gate.

known_gaps: history rewrite remains a separate explicit approval boundary if a future scan finds blockers
areas.next_action: Run publication readiness before push/tag/release decisions.

current_maturity_ledger.operational_use_boundary: Areas with can_use_operationally=false remain design or future-work surfaces.
current_maturity_ledger.public_claim_boundary: Areas with can_claim_publicly=false must not be marketed as live-proven.

dashboard_private_export_boundaries.public_export_policy: sanitize local paths, local user surfaces, and sensitive metadata

docs_freshness_tracking.blocking_policy: Meaningful source/schema/dashboard/workflow/adapter/release-gate changes must include the required impacted contract or docs refs in the same change set.

empty_state: Contract Atlas has no contracts to display.

github_cicd_profile.github_actions_minutes_policy: avoid_full_matrix_on_push; run cheap pr-smoke on pull_request; full-ci is workflow_dispatch only
github_cicd_profile.github_actions_unavailable_policy: do_not_block_development; preserve local_release_gate as primary; manual review required before merge if required remote smoke is unavailable

profiles.honest_empty_state: Core runtime can report state without dashboard/API process.
Analytics routes return empty sections when no normalized facts exist.
No security findings recorded for the selected scope.
No token or AI usage records have been imported or captured.
No telemetry records have been captured yet.
Dashboard displays derived empty states when sources are empty.
Unsupported adapters are listed as unsupported or context-packet-only.
Shared-intelligence sections report their own empty states.
Optional integrations show empty or unavailable state honestly.
Core runtime can report state without dashboard/API process.

No security findings recorded for the selected scope.

No telemetry records have been captured yet.
Dashboard displays derived empty states when sources are empty.
Unsupported adapters are listed as unsupported or context-packet-only.
Shared-intelligence sections report their own empty states.
Optional integrations show empty or unavailable state honestly.

layer_contracts.boundary: Repo files must not embed operator-local secrets or live state.
SQLite writes require explicit runtime/tooling authorization.
Read models summarize facts and must keep authority metadata.
Dashboard output is derived and non-authoritative.
Claude, Codex, and other adapters consume projections only.
Optional profiles must receive explicit SQLite paths.

maturity_scorecard.reason: Staleness and hook command compatibility can be checked safely; live Claude/Codex execution is not proven by this read model.
Edges are generated from repo constants, route declarations, and adapter authority profiles.
Private atlas is default; public export removes local paths and local user-surface detail.

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Optional surfaces report unavailable without creating state.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Core reports runtime paths and missing optional surfaces honestly.
contracts.purpose: Bootstrap source/state paths, SQLite, runtime config, and global commands.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Core path and DB health are release readiness inputs.
write_dependencies: state/studio.db bootstrap during install or rehearsal

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Dashboard consumers show telemetry unavailable or empty.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: No telemetry records have been captured yet.
contracts.purpose: Persist and read operational events, validations, invocations, outcomes, and artifacts.
read_dependencies: project authority tables when scoped by project
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Validation and evidence recency affect health/readiness.
write_dependencies: explicit telemetry producers or analytics ingestion

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Optional panels show unavailable with a reason.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Derived views render honest empty states when source facts are absent.
contracts.purpose: Expose derived human-facing API and UI read models without owning authority.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Dashboard integrity and stale data detection affect health.

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Security panels show no findings or unavailable controls.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: No security findings recorded for the selected scope.
contracts.purpose: Read and classify security findings and 47-control lifecycle status independently.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Open security findings and unknown controls can block release.
write_dependencies: security lifecycle gate or explicit normalized import

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Usage panels show unavailable or no usage records.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: No token or AI usage records have been imported or captured.
contracts.policy: Tokens are usage telemetry; cost remains unknown unless provider-reported or configured.
contracts.purpose: Report token and AI usage telemetry without inventing per-run cost.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Usage outcome quality can inform readiness; unknown cost is not a blocker.
write_dependencies: provider metadata, provider export, local telemetry, or explicit import

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Missing optional facts appear as unavailable, not zero.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Analytics routes return empty sections when no normalized facts exist.
contracts.purpose: Import normalized analytics and expose read-only dashboard/API intelligence standalone.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Imported facts can feed health/readiness but do not overclaim evidence.

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Live adapter execution stays unavailable; context packets still work.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Shared intelligence sections report their own empty states.
contracts.purpose: Expose adapter, model, context packet, usage accounting, and Contract Atlas read models.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Adapter/accounting confidence affects readiness evidence quality.
write_dependencies: setup/config commands only when explicitly authorized

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Works without dashboard/frontend and without live adapter execution.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Unsupported adapters are listed as unsupported or context-packet-only.
contracts.purpose: Classify adapter modes, route capabilities, health, context packets, and result normalization.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Adapter staleness and unsupported modes inform release attention.
write_dependencies: evidence capture only when explicitly authorized

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Adapters fall back to context packets or unsupported classification.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: No generated projection exists until adapter authority is configured.
contracts.purpose: Generate adapter-specific projected instructions without becoming source authority.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Projection staleness can create dashboard attention.
write_dependencies: repo projection files only when projection generation is explicitly requested

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: External projects stay evidence-only when mutation is not approved.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Project detail shows missing evidence or manual-review flags honestly.
contracts.purpose: Represent imported or observed external projects without mutating them by default.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: External onboarding and publication readiness consume project evidence.
write_dependencies: Dream Studio SQLite authority; external repo writes require explicit approval

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Docker unavailable never disables core authority or analytics-only.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: Docker status is optional or unavailable, not failed core runtime.
contracts.purpose: Provide optional isolated validation/runtime profiles without owning Dream Studio authority.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Docker changes trigger readiness review; Docker is not core authority.

contracts.disabled_module_behavior: Optional integrations show empty or unavailable state honestly.
contracts.empty_state_behavior: No optional integrations are claimed until evidence exists.
contracts.purpose: Enable all local read models and optional integrations while preserving module boundaries.
contracts.security_readiness_impact: Full profile release gate aggregates module health and readiness.

missing_evidence: data classification and legal review evidence
release gate, rollback, docs drift, and publication evidence
project_readiness_score.reason: Applicable controls require evidence or manual review before scoring.

security_skill_control_mapping.behavior: Static diff/code review with high-confidence findings only.
Baseline scan orchestration when approved by Work Order scope.
Runtime/web/API testing only after target and credential scope approval.
Binary/image artifact review when artifact scope is approved.
Remediation planning and patch guidance after findings are confirmed current.

canonical_authority: repo source for product code and public contracts
operator-local SQLite for structured runtime authority
operator-local evidence packets for private audit exports

required_boundaries: adapters do not own canonical state
Docker profiles must not create a competing authority DB
